4fe16a88415d.title: Publish opening hours — you're invisible to 'open now' searches
4fe16a88415d.description: No opening hours listed. Every customer filtering by 'open now' on Google Maps will never see you. This takes 2 minutes to fix.
4fe16a88415d.management_implication: This is a zero-effort, high-impact fix.

d2016e1ad1a2.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
d2016e1ad1a2.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
d2016e1ad1a2.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

806ecfdf41b2.title: Identify and fix the recurring guest complaint
806ecfdf41b2.description: At 3.9/5 on Google, something specific is landing badly. Read the 5 most recent negative reviews, identify the common thread, and fix it at source. The rating won't move until the root cause does.
806ecfdf41b2.management_implication: Below 4.0, Google actively suppresses your venue in search results.

e89a3d5f0c72.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
e89a3d5f0c72.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.
